green.label: Empathetic Check-in
green.description: Noticing changes in mood or checking in on well-being.

green.label: Unprompted Appreciation
green.description: Expressing gratitude or affection without immediate prompting.

green.label: Active Presence
green.description: Offering to show up physically or providing immediate support.

green.label: Proactive Planning
green.description: Initiating plans and taking ownership of shared time.

green.label: Difficult Conversation Follow-up
green.description: Revisiting hard topics to ensure resolution and warmth.

green.label: Active Support
green.description: Validating that you have the other person's back unconditionally.

green.label: Owning Mistakes
green.description: Apologizing sincerely and taking responsibility for friction.

green.label: Detail Recall
green.description: Remembering small facts or stories shared in previous conversations.

green.label: Active Encouragement
green.description: Cheering the other person on and expressing pride in their actions.

green.label: Celebrating Wins
green.description: Sharing excitement and validating their achievements.

green.label: Sincere Comforting
green.description: De-escalating stress and offering soothing, grounding reassurance.

green.label: Checking in by Voice
green.description: Requesting or initiating calls specifically to check on them.

green.label: Judgment-Free Zone
green.description: Explicitly establishing a safe space for open disclosure.

green.label: Nostalgic Bonding
green.description: Sharing positive memories and reinforcing connection history.

green.label: Eager Anticipation
green.description: Expressing positive excitement about spending time together.

green.label: Expressing Trust
green.description: Communicating safety and thanking them for being a good listener.

green.label: Small Kind Gestures
green.description: Bringing gifts, food, or surprises without being asked.

green.label: Shared Humor
green.description: Laughing together and maintaining lighthearted energy.

green.label: Respecting Boundaries
green.description: Explicitly validating their need for space, time, or limits.

green.label: Safe Arrival Validation
green.description: Checking if they arrived safely or asking for home texts.
keywords: let me know when you get home
text me when you get back

red.label: Consistent Deflection
red.description: Avoiding commitments or kicking decisions down the road.

red.label: One-Word Deflation
red.description: Short, dry responses when the conversation demands depth.

red.label: Repeated Cancellations
red.description: Backing out of plans at the last minute.
keywords: won't be able to make it

red.label: Abrupt Topic Change
red.description: Diverting attention away from uncomfortable emotional topics.
